errors.name: NotMasterAuthority
errors.msg: Signer is not the master authority

errors.name: NotMinter
errors.msg: Signer is not authorized to mint

errors.name: NotBurner
errors.msg: Signer is not authorized to burn

errors.name: NotBlacklister
errors.msg: Signer is not the blacklister

errors.name: NotSeizer
errors.msg: Signer is not the seizer

errors.name: NotPauser
errors.msg: Signer is not the pauser

errors.name: ComplianceNotEnabled
errors.msg: Compliance module not enabled. Initialize with enable_transfer_hook: true for SSS-2

errors.name: PermanentDelegateNotEnabled
errors.msg: Permanent delegate not enabled. Initialize with enable_permanent_delegate: true for SSS-2

errors.name: HookNotRegistered
errors.msg: Transfer hook not registered on this stablecoin

errors.name: Paused
errors.msg: Stablecoin is paused

errors.name: NotPaused
errors.msg: Stablecoin is not paused

errors.name: AlreadyBlacklisted
errors.msg: Address is already blacklisted

errors.name: NotBlacklisted
errors.msg: Address is not blacklisted

errors.name: InvalidBlacklistTarget
errors.msg: Cannot blacklist the zero address

errors.name: AccountNotFrozen
errors.msg: Cannot seize from a non-frozen account

errors.name: QuotaExceeded
errors.msg: Mint amount exceeds per-period quota

errors.name: MinterInactive
errors.msg: Minter is inactive

errors.name: MinterAlreadyExists
errors.msg: Minter config already exists

errors.name: NoPendingTransfer
errors.msg: No pending authority transfer

errors.name: NotPendingAuthority
errors.msg: Signer is not the pending authority

errors.name: NameTooLong
errors.msg: Name exceeds 32 characters

errors.name: SymbolTooLong
errors.msg: Symbol exceeds 10 characters

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: SupplyOverflow
errors.msg: Overflow in supply calculation

errors.name: SenderNotAllowed
errors.msg: Sender is not on the allowlist — SSS-3 requires explicit allowlist membership to send

errors.name: RecipientNotAllowed
errors.msg: Recipient is not on the allowlist — SSS-3 requires explicit allowlist membership to receive

errors.name: AllowlistEntryExpired
errors.msg: Allowlist entry has expired — request renewal from the issuer

errors.name: SendPermissionDenied
errors.msg: Sender's allowlist entry does not grant SEND permission

errors.name: ReceivePermissionDenied
errors.msg: Recipient's allowlist entry does not grant RECEIVE permission

errors.name: AlreadyAllowlisted
errors.msg: Address is already on the allowlist

errors.name: NotOnAllowlist
errors.msg: Address is not on the allowlist — cannot remove what doesn't exist

errors.name: ConfidentialNotEnabled
errors.msg: Confidential transfers are not enabled on this mint

errors.name: ConfidentialAlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: Confidential config already initialized for this mint

errors.name: AutoApproveDisabled
errors.msg: Auto-approve is disabled — authority must call approve_confidential_account first

errors.name: AccountNotApproved
errors.msg: Confidential token account has not been approved for confidential transfers

errors.name: InvalidAuditorKey
errors.msg: Auditor ElGamal pubkey is not 64 bytes — check key format

errors.name: MaxSupplyExceeded
errors.msg: Mint would exceed the configured max_supply cap

errors.name: MaxSupplyBelowCurrentSupply
errors.msg: New max supply cannot be less than the current total supply

errors.name: AllowlistNotActive
errors.msg: Allowlist mode is not active on this mint — this instruction requires SSS-3

errors.name: CannotDisableAllowlist
errors.msg: Cannot disable allowlist mode once active — security invariant

errors.name: RequiresSss2Preset
errors.msg: Cannot initialize SSS-3 on a non-SSS-2 mint — upgrade to SSS-2 first

errors.name: SnapshotAlreadyTaken
errors.msg: A supply snapshot has already been taken for today — one per day maximum

errors.name: MultisigAlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: Multisig already initialized for this mint

errors.name: InvalidThreshold
errors.msg: Invalid multisig threshold — must be > 0 and <= number of signers

errors.name: SignerNotMultisigMember
errors.msg: Signer is not a member of the multisig

errors.name: DuplicateApproval
errors.msg: Signer has already approved this proposal

errors.name: ProposalAlreadyExecuted
errors.msg: Proposal has already been executed

errors.name: ProposalCancelled
errors.msg: Proposal has been cancelled

errors.name: ThresholdNotMet
errors.msg: Proposal is not approved — threshold not met

errors.name: ProposalTimeLockNotMatured
errors.msg: Proposal time-lock has not matured yet

errors.name: DirectExecutionBlockedByMultisig
errors.msg: Direct execution blocked — SSS-3 Multisig is active, action must go through a proposal

fields.name: mint
docs: The SSS token mint this entry is for

fields.name: address
docs: The wallet address being allowlisted

fields.name: allowed_operations
docs: Bitmask of permitted operations — see allowlist_ops
0x01 = receive, 0x02 = send, 0x03 = both

fields.name: kyc_tier
docs: KYC tier (application-level metadata, not enforced by program)
0 = basic, 1 = enhanced (EDD), 2 = institutional

fields.name: expiry
docs: Optional expiry timestamp.
0 = never expires
If current time > expiry: hook rejects the transfer

fields.name: added_by
docs: Who added this entry

fields.name: added_at
docs: Timestamp this entry was added

fields.name: reason
docs: Reason for allowlisting (audit trail)

fields.name: active
docs: Whether this entry is active.
Soft-delete: set to false rather than closing the account.

fields.name: removed_by
docs: If active=false, who removed it

fields.name: removed_at
docs: If active=false, when it was removed

fields.name: version
docs: Schema version — increment if structure changes

fields.name: mint
docs: The SSS token mint this confidential config is for

fields.name: authority
docs: Authority that can update this config (same as StablecoinConfig.master_authority)

fields.name: auditor_elgamal_pubkey
docs: ElGamal public key of the auditor.
The holder of the corresponding private key can decrypt ALL ciphertext
balances and transfer amounts on this mint.
SECURITY: Treat this key material with HSM-level protection.
If None: no auditor — fully private (not recommended for regulated tokens)
If Some: auditor can see all amounts — compliant but privacy-limited
Stored as 64 raw bytes (the compressed ElGamal pubkey format used by
Token-2022's ConfidentialTransferMint extension)

fields.name: auto_approve_new_accounts
docs: If true: any wallet can self-configure their ATA for confidential use.
If false: the authority must explicitly call approve_confidential_account.
For regulated stablecoins: MUST be false.

fields.name: compliance_note
docs: Human-readable note about the compliance/auditing arrangement.
e.g. "Auditor key held by XYZ Law Firm under data protection agreement"

fields.name: enabled_at
docs: Timestamp when confidential mode was enabled

fields.name: enabled_by
docs: Who enabled confidential mode

fields.name: total_confidential_transfers
docs: Cumulative count of confidential transfer operations

fields.name: max_supply
docs: Maximum token supply. 0 = unlimited.
Enforced in mint instruction: current_supply + amount <= max_supply (if > 0)

fields.name: total_mint_operations
docs: Total number of successful mint operations (operation count, not amount)

fields.name: total_burn_operations
docs: Total number of successful burn operations

fields.name: largest_single_mint
docs: Largest single mint amount ever (in token base units)

fields.name: last_mint_at
docs: Timestamp of the most recent mint operation

fields.name: last_burn_at
docs: Timestamp of the most recent burn operation

fields.name: confidential_transfers_enabled
docs: Whether confidential transfers are enabled on this mint

fields.name: allowlist_active
docs: Whether scoped allowlist enforcement is active.
false = SSS-1/SSS-2 (blacklist model), true = SSS-3 (allowlist model)

fields.name: allowlist_count
docs: Count of active allowlist entries (for dashboard display)

fields.name: minter_count
docs: Count of active minters

fields.name: multisig_enabled
docs: Whether SSS-3 Multisig governance is enabled
